title: 谷歌发布 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate，支持70+语言低延迟翻译
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
GOOGLE 🔥: A new Gemini 3.5 Live Translate model has been released with a support of low latency translation across 70+ languages!
The model is now available in Preview on AI Studio and APIs. Google Meet will soon start using this model for live translation too.
Google
@Google
11h
Replying to @Google By translating continuously as you speak, Gemini 3.5 Live Translate generates smooth, natural-sounding speech without pauses.
Soon, Google Meet will use Gemini 3.5 Live Translate for Speech Translation.
This update is launching in private preview for select business Google Show more
00:00
6:17 PM · Jun 9, 2026 10K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: 谷歌发布 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate，支持70+语言低延迟翻译
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Google 推出 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 模型，支持对 70 多种语言进行低延迟实时翻译，已在 AI Studio 和 API 上开放预览。该模型可边说话边连续翻译，生成自然流畅的语音。Google Meet 即将接入该模型实现实时语音翻译。本月起，面向部分 Google Workspace 企业客户启动私密预览，年内将更广泛推出。

key_excerpts.text: Google 推出 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 模型，支持对 70 多种语言进行低延迟实时翻译，已在 AI Studio 和 API 上开放预览。该模型可边说话边连续翻译，生成自然流畅的语音。Google Meet 即将接入该模型实现实时语音翻译。本月起，面向部分 Google Workspace 企业客户启动私密预览，年内将更广泛推出。
Post Log in Sign up Post 🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog @testingcatalog GOOGLE 🔥: A new Gemini 3.
5 Live Translate model has been released with a support of low latency translation across 70+ languages!
The model is now available in Preview on AI Studio and APIs.
Google Meet will soon start using this model for live translation too.
Google @Google 11h Replying to @Google By translating continuously as you speak, Gemini 3.
